report.summary: Cycle v20: git index.lock persists (14+ hours, 533 uncommitted files). 3 new learn guides built since last EOD (Hyperliquid, FOMC, PEAQ DePIN). PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated to Hyperliquid + FOMC. 378 published pages stable. 42 TS errors unchanged. 0/6 API routes have rate limiting (16th consecutive flag). FOMC T-2.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) — git index.lock continues blocking all commits (created 13:06 today, now 14+ hours).
Working tree: 533 uncommitted files (up from 513 in v19, net +20). 43 modified tracked files + 490 new untracked files.
3 new learn guide page.tsx files created since last EOD: hyperliquid-trading-guide, fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide, peaq-depin-robotics-guide-2026.
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 378 slugs stable. ~102 slugs served by dynamic [slug] route (no dedicated page.tsx) — known, not a regression.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/hyperliquid-trading-guide, /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide (rotated from fair-token-launches + peaq-depin).

TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files (unchanged) — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts needs .tsx rename), 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (unescaped <> in JSX). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
Local build: Bus error (OOM) — VM memory insufficient for 826+ page build. Vercel production builds unaffected (8GB machines).
No new regressions detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko, 60s TTL, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=120. Stale cache fallback. No rate limiter.
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, s-maxage=600, stale-while-revalidate=1200. Stale cache fallback. No rate limiter.
/api/trending — CoinGecko, 300s TTL, s-maxage=300, stale-while-revalidate=600. Stale cache fallback. No rate limiter.
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko aggregated, 60s TTL, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=120. Mock data fallback. No rate limiter.
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko, 300s TTL, s-maxage=300, stale-while-revalidate=600. Full hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA + stale cache. No rate limiter.
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL). Returns 500 on failure. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
All 6 routes share api-helpers.ts circuit breaker (5 failures, 1min reset) + exponential backoff.
PERSISTENT: checkRateLimit() exists in rate-limiter.ts but wired to 0/6 public API routes — 16th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-2) traffic spike risk.
Cannot verify live endpoints — VM egress blocked for degen0x.com and upstream APIs (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me).

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Latest deploy: cb65a9d (Day 42 publish). No new commits possible — git index.lock blocking.
git index.lock: created 13:06 Mar 16 — now 14+ hours. 533 uncommitted files (up from 513 in v19).
Next.js config stable: standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors: true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, workerThreads: false.
Middleware: 127 lines, PILLAR_PAGES inlined, security headers + robots tags + cache-control all configured.
Vercel trial expiry flagged in v19 (~3 days remaining). Jefe action required.
No incidents detected. Vercel deployment presumed healthy (sandbox cannot verify externally).
90+ files touched since last EOD across API routes, data files, learn pages, lib utilities — all uncommitted.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: BUILT THIS CYCLE: 3 new learn guides (Hyperliquid Trading, FOMC Fed Rate Impact, PEAQ DePIN Robotics). All uncommitted due to git lock.
PUBLISH_QUEUE ROTATED: Now contains hyperliquid-trading-guide + fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide (2 items). Previous items (fair-token-launches + peaq-depin) presumably promoted or built as page.tsx.
DELTA SINCE v19: Working tree +20 files (513→533). 90+ files modified across API routes, data layers, pages, and utilities.
NOTHING SHIPPED — all work trapped behind git index.lock. 0 commits, 0 deploys this cycle.

CARRY-OVER (priority): (1) [P0] rm .git/index.lock — single biggest blocker, 14+ hours, 533 files at risk. (2) [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days — site goes dark. (3) [P0] Batch-commit 533 files after lock removal. (4) [P0] Apply checkRateLimit to 6 API routes (16 cycles overdue, FOMC T-2). (5) [P1] Rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx. (6) [P1] Fix unescaped JSX in crypto-index-funds-guide. (7) [P1] Add fallback data to defi-yields.
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock must be removed (rm .git/index.lock) before any work can ship. 533 files of uncommitted work at risk. Vercel trial nearing expiry.
